case_title: JASON MELZER et al VS. ALBERT J. PAVESI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,357.00 FILED BY MELZER, JASON MOSSMAN, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT PAVESI, ALBERT J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-06-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MELZER, JASON MOSSMAN, DANIELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAVESI, ALBERT J. $1,904.00 PRINCIPAL, $179.40 INTEREST, $63.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,146.40, THE COURT FINDS THE DEDUCTION FOR PAINTING SHOULD BE DISALLOWED AS THE PAINTING WAS LAST PERFORMED MORE THAN 3 YEARS AGO, THAT THE DEDUCTION FOR HARDWOOD FLOOR WORK SHOULD BE DISALLOWED FOR FAILURE OF THE LANDLORD TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (G), AND THAT THE TENANTS ARE ENTITLED TO INTEREST ON THEIR SECURITY DEPOSIT PURSUANT TO CHAPTER 49 OF THE SAN FRANCISCO ADMINISTRATION CODE BECAUSE THE WAS HELD MORE THAN ONE YEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-06-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-06-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-23-2009, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAVESI, ALBERT J.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MELZER, JASON MOSSMAN, DANIELLE AS TO DEFENDANT PAVESI, ALBERT J.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PAVESI, ALBERT J.
COPYING FEES PAID BY PLAINTIFF MELZER, JASON MOSSMAN, DANIELLE
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY MELZER, JASON MOSSMAN, DANIELLE PAVESI, ALBERT J.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF MELZER, JASON MOSSMAN, DANIELLE ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-06-2009 - JUDGMENT.
